unusual 0% on E2E tests

still some issue with the VNF tests on Azure (incomplete config)
still also the race condition on SDC when trying to create customer in // (clearwater_ims)
basic_vm & freeradius_nbi test are OK up to the openstack instanciation (all the ONAP part is correct)

+ K.K for the pnf-registrate error

APPC is not covered (yet) by the End to End use cases in Frankfurt.
So I assume as all the infra + healthcheck tests are OK, we can merge
Change has been successfully merged by Sylvain Desbureaux
